title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A STOCK FARM IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ABUYOG, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 14573 / 65 OG No. 24, 6102 (June 16, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5329, June 15, 1968 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING A STOCK FARM IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ABUYOG, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There is hereby established under the supervision of the Director of Animal Industry, an animal stock farm in the Municipality of Abuyog, Province of Leyte, at a suitable site that may be reserved or acquired for the purpose.

SEC. 2. The Director of Animal Industry, with the approval of the Secretary of Agriculture and Natural Resources, shall issue such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act.

SEC. 3. The sum of two hundred fifty thousand pesos is hereby authorized to be appropriated, out of any funds in the National Treasury not otherwise appropriated, for establishment, operation and maintenance of said stock farm for the fiscal year nineteen hundred sixty-nine. Thereafter, such sums as may be needed for the same purpose shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 15, 1968.
